author: Udalricus (Ulrich von Brixen/ Ulricus Putsch)
title: Sumula mysteriorum missae / Manuale simplicium sacerdotum
remarks: BSB Clm 18595, 165v-204; Clm 5199, ff. 197-224; Clm 5667, ff. 1-58v; Excerpts from the Rationale. **This was later to be Nicholas of Cusa's see**
link: See Nigel Harris, The Light of the Soul, pg. 54
